game_meta.name: PUBG: Battlegrounds
game_meta.tagline: 100-player battle royale. Solo, duo, or squad. Last team standing wins.
game_meta.character_vocab: squad roles — IGL, Fragger, Sniper, Support, Scout, Anchor
game_meta.round_format: Single match, ~30 minutes. Zone shrinks ~7-9 times.
key_mechanics: Loot prioritization — armor + helmet + meds before damage attachments
Bluezone (poison gas) — track timer, time the next rotation
Map-specific drop strategy (hot drop vs edge drop)
Sound discipline — footstep + reload + gunshot directional reads
Recoil patterns per weapon — AKM, Beryl M762, M416 spray control
Grenade lineups for compounds (frags, smokes, flashes)

IGL.notes: Drops calls, rotation calls, target priority.

Anchor.notes: Stays in cover. Watches off-angles for third party.

bronze_silver: Looting in the open instead of cover
gold_plat: Bad rotation timing — late to next zone, fighting through bluezone
Wrong angle holds — droneable from elevation
No grenade lineups for compound pushes
diamond_plus: Squad spread too thin — can't support each other

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
